valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: New high expected Shannon 1023 by 1800 Saturday. Low northwest Bailey 994 losing its identity. High Biscay 1016 dissipating

Rain then showers, fog patches.

Moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
